description_long: This is a modern, multi-functional shelving unit with an integrated desk. The shelving portion consists of three thick, rectangular, white shelves arranged in a staggered, zigzag pattern, supported by vertical metal rods. The desk section is attached to the right side of the shelving, made of dark wood with a smooth finish, and features three open rectangular supports on one side. On top of the desk sits a red cylindrical cup or container with a white straw and a metallic pen or utensil. The overall design is geometric and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as offices, studios, or public spaces. The structure appears sturdy and offers ample surface area for storage and display.
description: A modern zigzag white shelving unit with a dark wood desk attached, featuring metal supports and a red cup on the desk. The design is geometric and contemporary, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the white shelves and the dark wood desk extending outward, with the red cup visible on the desk.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the zigzag arrangement of the shelves, the full surface of the desk, and the red cup with a pen on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the thickness of the shelves and the desk's attachment, with the cup and pen still visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view of the shelving unit, clearly displaying the three staggered white shelves and the partial view of the desk behind them.
